name: ASUS TUF Gaming 1000W Gold Fully Modular Power Supply - 80 PLUS Gold Certified - ATX 3.0 Compatible - 135mm Dual Ball Bearing Fan - 1x 16-pin PCIe Connector - 4x 8-pin PCIe Connectors (TUF-GAMING-1000G)
